1.title: Open Floor Flatness at Rack base -Evaluation Model Panel

content.text: System shall open the Floor Flatness at Rack Base (G4) — Evaluation Model panel when the user selects the G4 test from the Rules and Actions → Testing tab.
open the Floor Flatness at Rack Base (G4) evaluation model panel
I can review the evaluation logic for the G4 test.
the user is on the Rules and Actions → Testing tab
the user selects the Floor flatness at Rack base test
the system shall open the Floor Flatness at Rack Base (G4) — Evaluation Model panel.
System shall display the panel title “Floor Flatness at Rack Base (G4) — Evaluation Model”.
I clearly identify the evaluation panel.
the G4 evaluation panel is opened
the system shall display the title “Floor Flatness at Rack Base (G4) — Evaluation Model.”
System shall display a Global scope indicator beside the evaluation model title.
the evaluation model panel is displayed
the system shall display a Global scope indicator beside the title.
System shall display a description indicating the evaluation is derived from base elevation survey data (Z coordinates).
I understand how the evaluation is derived.
the evaluation model panel is displayed
the system shall display a description explaining the evaluation is derived from base elevation survey data (Z coordinates).
System shall display a Measurement Basis section explaining that evaluation is computed from base elevation values (Z_base,j) measured at each upright base location.
I understand how elevation data is used.
the evaluation model panel is displayed
the system shall display that evaluation is computed using base elevation values (Z_base,j).
System shall display that the calculation is performed across all uprights within the same rack run.
I understand which uprights are evaluated.
the Measurement Basis section is displayed
the system shall indicate that calculations are performed across all uprights within the same rack run.
System shall display the definition Z_base,j represents the elevation at the base of upright j.
I understand the parameter used in the evaluation.
the system shall display the definition Z_base,j represents the elevation at the base of upright j.
System shall display supported survey data sources such as Drone + Laser or Total Station.
the system shall display supported sources such as Drone + Laser and Total Station.
System shall indicate that the calculation uses absolute elevation values rather than deviation profile δ(z).
I know how elevation values are used.
the evaluation model panel is displayed
the system shall indicate that the calculation uses absolute elevation values rather than deviation profile δ(z).
System shall display a note indicating Plumb Bob instrument does not support the G4 evaluation model.
the system shall display a note that Plumb Bob instrument does not support the G4 evaluation model.
System shall require a minimum of two base elevation measurements to perform the G4 evaluation.
the system shall indicate that a minimum of two base elevation measurements is required.
System shall display a recommendation that all uprights within the rack run should be measured.
I can collect complete survey data.
the system shall recommend measuring all uprights within the rack run.

13.title: Display Calculation Logic in Read-Only Mode

content.text: System shall display the Calculation Logic section in read-only mode.
I understand how results are generated.
the system shall display the calculation logic in read-only mode.
System shall collect base elevation values (Z_base,j) from survey measurements.
the system to collect base elevation values
the system shall collect Z_base,j values for each upright.
System shall compute the maximum elevation differential ΔZ_max = max(Z_base,j) − min(Z_base,j) across the rack run.
the system to calculate the elevation difference
rack floor flatness can be evaluated.
the system shall compute ΔZ_max = max(Z_base,j) − min(Z_base,j).
System shall define ΔZ_max as the maximum elevation difference across uprights within the rack run in millimetres.
the system shall define ΔZ_max as the maximum elevation difference across uprights within the rack run in millimetres.
System shall display a RAG Criteria section with locked thresholds indicating the values are system defined.
the system shall display system-defined thresholds in locked format.
System shall classify the result as Green when ΔZ_max ≤ 3 mm.
acceptable floor conditions can be identified.
the system shall classify the result as Green.
System shall classify the result as Amber when 3 mm < ΔZ_max ≤ 5 mm.
the system shall classify the result as Amber.
System shall classify the result as Red when ΔZ_max > 5 mm.
the system shall classify the result as Red.
System shall display an informational note indicating thresholds are based on rack installation tolerance and floor settlement control guidance.
I know they follow installation standards.
the RAG criteria section is displayed
the system shall display a note explaining thresholds are based on rack installation tolerance and floor settlement control guidance.
System shall display an Output Preview section showing automatically calculated evaluation results.
the system shall display automatically calculated evaluation results.
System shall display the computed maximum elevation difference (ΔZ_max in mm) in the Output Preview.
the system shall display ΔZ_max in millimetres.
System shall display the Highest Base Location identified from the elevation dataset.
I know the highest elevation point.
the system shall display the Highest Base Location.
System shall display the Lowest Base Location identified from the elevation dataset.
I know the lowest elevation point.
the system shall display the Lowest Base Location.
System shall display the Governing Upright Pair responsible for the maximum elevation differential.
I know which uprights caused the maximum differential.
the system shall display the Governing Upright Pair.
System shall display the Rack Row ID associated with the evaluation.
I know which rack run the evaluation applies to.
the system shall display the Rack Row ID.
System shall display the final RAG classification result in the Output Preview.
the system shall display the final RAG classification.
System shall populate the output values automatically based on survey data provided for the rack row.
output values to be auto populated
I do not need manual calculations.
the system shall automatically populate the output value.
System shall allow the user to close the panel using the Close (X) icon in the panel header.
close the evaluation panel using the close icon
I can exit the panel quickly.
the user clicks the Close (X) icon
the system shall close the panel.
System shall provide a Close button to exit the evaluation panel.
a close button in the panel
I can exit the evaluation panel.
the user clicks the Close button
the system shall close the evaluation panel.
System shall return the user to the Rules and Actions → Testing tab after closing the panel.
return to the Testing tab after closing the panel
I can continue working in the Rules and Actions module.
the system shall return the user to Rules and Actions → Testing tab.
